issues.message:
Error: Calling setState synchronously within an effect can trigger cascading renders

Effects are intended to synchronize state between React and external systems such as manually updating the DOM, state management libraries, or other platform APIs. In general, the body of an effect should do one or both of the following:
* Update external systems with the latest state from React.
* Subscribe for updates from some external system, calling setState in a callback function when external state changes.

Calling setState synchronously within an effect body causes cascading renders that can hurt performance, and is not recommended. (https://react.dev/learn/you-might-not-need-an-effect).

  2431 |     }
> 2432 |     setTerminalLaunchContext((current) => (current?.threadId === activeThreadId ? null : current));

react-hooks-js(set-state-in-effect)
issues.message:
Error: Calling setState synchronously within an effect can trigger cascading renders

Effects are intended to synchronize state between React and external systems such as manually updating the DOM, state management libraries, or other platform APIs. In general, the body of an effect should do one or both of the following:
* Update external systems with the latest state from React.
* Subscribe for updates from some external system, calling setState in a callback function when external state changes.

Calling setState synchronously within an effect body causes cascading renders that can hurt performance, and is not recommended. (https://react.dev/learn/you-might-not-need-an-effect).

issues.title: react-doctor(no-giant-component)
issues.message: Component "ProviderSettingsPanel" is 416 lines - consider breaking it into smaller focused components

issues.title: react-doctor(js-cache-function-results)
issues.message: useState(false) is computed repeatedly in the same block - cache the result in one variable or a module-level Map if it is reused across calls

issues.title: react-doctor(js-combine-iterations)
issues.message: .map().filter() iterates the array twice - combine into a single loop with .reduce() or for...of

issues.title: react-doctor(js-combine-iterations)
issues.message: .filter().map() iterates the array twice - combine into a single loop with .reduce() or for...of

issues.title: react-doctor(no-icon-only-button-without-label)
issues.message: icon-only button has no accessible name - add aria-label or aria-labelledby and hide decorative icons with aria-hidden

issues.title: react-doctor(js-combine-iterations)
issues.message: .map().filter() iterates the array twice - combine into a single loop with .reduce() or for...of

issues.title: react-doctor(rerender-split-combined-hooks)
issues.message: hook callback performs multiple steps with multiple dependencies - split independent work into separate hooks so one dependency change does not rerun unrelated work

issues.title: react-doctor(rendering-content-visibility)
issues.message: large mapped list item lacks content-visibility hints - add contentVisibility: 'auto' / containIntrinsicSize or virtualize the list to defer off-screen work

issues.title: react-doctor(js-cache-function-results)

issues.title: react-doctor(js-set-map-lookups)
issues.message: array.includes() in a loop is O(n) per call - convert to a Set for O(1) lookups

issues.title: react-doctor(no-swallowed-error)
issues.message: empty catch block swallows runtime evidence - log, recover, or rethrow the error

issues.title: react-doctor(js-set-map-lookups)
issues.message: array.includes() in a loop is O(n) per call - convert to a Set for O(1) lookups

issues.title: react-doctor(client-event-listeners)
issues.message: global event listener is registered per component instance - share it through a module-level subscription or useSWRSubscription so N components don't add N listeners

issues.title: react-doctor(js-index-maps)
issues.message: array.find() in a loop is O(n*m) - build a Map for O(1) lookups

issues.title: react-doctor(js-combine-iterations)
issues.message: .flatMap().filter() iterates the array twice - combine into a single loop with .reduce() or for...of

issues.title: react-doctor(js-combine-iterations)
issues.message: .filter().flatMap() iterates the array twice - combine into a single loop with .reduce() or for...of

issues.title: react-doctor(js-set-map-lookups)
issues.message: array.indexOf() in a loop is O(n) per call - convert to a Set for O(1) lookups

issues.title: react-doctor(rerender-split-combined-hooks)
issues.message: hook callback performs multiple steps with multiple dependencies - split independent work into separate hooks so one dependency change does not rerun unrelated work

issues.title: react-doctor(client-event-listeners)
issues.message: global event listener is registered per component instance - share it through a module-level subscription or useSWRSubscription so N components don't add N listeners

issues.title: react-doctor(no-icon-only-button-without-label)
issues.message: icon-only button has no accessible name - add aria-label or aria-labelledby and hide decorative icons with aria-hidden

issues.title: react-doctor(no-icon-only-button-without-label)
issues.message: icon-only button has no accessible name - add aria-label or aria-labelledby and hide decorative icons with aria-hidden

issues.title: react-doctor(js-cache-property-access)
issues.message: timelineEntry.message.id is read 4 times inside this loop - hoist into a const at the top of the loop body

issues.title: react-doctor(js-cache-property-access)
issues.message: timelineEntry.message.role is read 4 times inside this loop - hoist into a const at the top of the loop body

issues.title: react-doctor(no-swallowed-error)
issues.message: empty catch block swallows runtime evidence - log, recover, or rethrow the error

issues.title: react-doctor(rerender-split-combined-hooks)
issues.message: hook callback performs multiple steps with multiple dependencies - split independent work into separate hooks so one dependency change does not rerun unrelated work

issues.title: jsx-a11y(no-static-element-interactions)
issues.message: Static HTML elements with event handlers require a role.
issues.recommendation: Add a role attribute to this element, or use a semantic HTML element instead.

issues.title: react-doctor(server-serialization)
issues.message: spreading server data into a client boundary can serialize unused fields - pass only the primitive props the client component needs

issues.title: react-hooks-js(preserve-manual-memoization)
issues.message:
Compilation Skipped: Existing memoization could not be preserved

React Compiler has skipped optimizing this component because the existing manual memoization could not be preserved. The inferred dependencies did not match the manually specified dependencies, which could cause the value to change more or less frequently than expected. The inferred dependency was `draftSession`, but the source dependencies were [draftSession?.promotedTo, serverThread, serverThreadStarted]. Inferred less specific property than source.

/Users/aidenybai/Developer/react-doctor-2/tmp/leaderboard-regression/t3code/apps/web/src/routes/_chat.draft.$draftId.tsx:24:5
  22 |   const serverThreadStarted = threadHasStarted(serverThread);
  23 |   const canonicalThreadRef = useMemo(
> 24 |     () =>
     |     ^^^^^
> 25 |       draftSession?.promotedTo
     | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
> 26 |         ? serverThreadStarted
     …
     | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
> 33 |             }
     | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
> 34 |           : null,
     | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ Could not preserve existing manual memoization
  35 |     [draftSession?.promotedTo, serverThread, serverThreadStarted],
  36 |   );
  37 |

issues.title: react(no-danger)
issues.message: Do not use `dangerouslySetInnerHTML` prop
issues.recommendation: `dangerouslySetInnerHTML` is a way to inject HTML into your React component. This is dangerous because it can easily lead to XSS vulnerabilities.

issues.title: react(no-danger)
issues.message: Do not use `dangerouslySetInnerHTML` prop
issues.recommendation: `dangerouslySetInnerHTML` is a way to inject HTML into your React component. This is dangerous because it can easily lead to XSS vulnerabilities.

issues.message:
Error: Calling setState synchronously within an effect can trigger cascading renders

Effects are intended to synchronize state between React and external systems such as manually updating the DOM, state management libraries, or other platform APIs. In general, the body of an effect should do one or both of the following:
* Update external systems with the latest state from React.
* Subscribe for updates from some external system, calling setState in a callback function when external state changes.

Calling setState synchronously within an effect body causes cascading renders that can hurt performance, and is not recommended. (https://react.dev/learn/you-might-not-need-an-effect).

  2431 |     }
> 2432 |     setTerminalLaunchContext((current) => (current?.threadId === activeThreadId ? null : current));
       |     ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ Avoid calling setState() directly within an effect

react-hooks-js(set-state-in-effect)
issues.message:
Error: Calling setState synchronously within an effect can trigger cascading renders

Effects are intended to synchronize state between React and external systems such as manually updating the DOM, state management libraries, or other platform APIs. In general, the body of an effect should do one or both of the following:
* Update external systems with the latest state from React.
* Subscribe for updates from some external system, calling setState in a callback function when external state changes.

Calling setState synchronously within an effect body causes cascading renders that can hurt performance, and is not recommended. (https://react.dev/learn/you-might-not-need-an-effect).

issues.title: react-doctor(server-serialization)
issues.message: spreading server data into a client boundary can serialize unused fields - pass only the primitive props the client component needs

issues.title: react-doctor(no-icon-only-button-without-label)
issues.message: icon-only button has no accessible name - add aria-label or aria-labelledby and hide decorative icons with aria-hidden

issues.title: react-doctor(js-cache-property-access)
issues.message: event.payload.threadId is read 4 times inside this loop - hoist into a const at the top of the loop body

issues.title: react-doctor(async-await-in-loop)
issues.message: await inside a for…of loop runs the calls sequentially - for independent operations, collect them and use `await Promise.all(items.map(...))` to run them concurrently

issues.title: react-hooks-js(todo)
react-doctor(rerender-split-combined-hooks)
issues.message: hook callback performs multiple steps with multiple dependencies - split independent work into separate hooks so one dependency change does not rerun unrelated work

issues.title: react-doctor(client-event-listeners)
